What I Do

Services that Elevate Brands

From concept to execution, I deliver end-to-end creative solutions that help businesses thrive in the digital age.

Brand Identity & Logo Design

Creating distinctive brand identities that resonate with your audience and differentiate you from competitors.

Logo Design
Brand Systems
Brand Guidelines
Rebranding

Motion Graphics & Animation

Bringing ideas to life with engaging animations that capture attention and communicate complex messages simply.

Social Media Animations
Promotional Videos
Animated Logos
Explainer Animations

Video Editing & Post Production

Professional video editing that transforms raw footage into polished, engaging content for any platform.

Commercial Editing
YouTube Editing
Reels & Shorts
Color Correction

High-quality print and digital designs that make an impact across all marketing channels.

How I Work

My Design Process

A proven, collaborative process that ensures exceptional results aligned with your business objectives.

🔍
Step 1

Discovery

Understanding your business, goals, target audience, and competitive landscape.

📊
Step 2

Research

Industry analysis, trend research, and gathering inspiration for the project direction.

💡
Step 3

Concept Development

Creating initial concepts and exploring different visual directions.

✏️
Step 4

Design Execution

Refining the chosen concept and creating detailed designs.

🔄
Step 5

Feedback & Refinement

Presenting designs, gathering feedback, and making necessary revisions.

🚀
Step 6

Final Delivery

Providing final files in all required formats and offering implementation support.

Expertise

Skills & Proficiencies

A comprehensive skill set spanning the entire creative spectrum, from branding to motion.

About Me

Designing Brands That Earn Attention& Build Trust

I help Kenyan businesses and entrepreneurs build brand identities, motion graphics, and digital experiences that turn attention into trust.

Every project is strategy-led — designed to look exceptional and perform even better.

My Design Philosophy

01

Strategy First

Every design decision should support a business goal.

02

Meaningful Visuals

Creating designs that communicate, not just decorate.

03

Lasting Impact

Building identities people remember.

James Kimani

Brand Designer & Motion Graphics Specialist

Why Choose Me

The Kim Designs Difference

I bring a rare combination of creative vision and strategic execution to every project.

Strategic Thinking

Every design decision is backed by research and aligned with your business goals.

Full-Service Creative

From branding to motion graphics, video editing to web design — all under one roof.

Client-Centered Process

Collaborative workflows with clear timelines and transparent communication.

Passion for Details

Pixel-perfect execution and obsessive attention to typography, spacing, and color.

Get in Touch

Let's Create Something Amazing

Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Send me a message and let's discuss how I can help bring your vision to life.
